scripts.vendor: mkdir -p static/vendor && esbuild assets/editor-vendor.js --bundle --minify --platform=browser --outfile=static/vendor/toastui-editor.js && cp node_modules/@toast-ui/editor/dist/toastui-editor.css static/vendor/ && cp node_modules/dompurify/dist/purify.min.js static/vendor/ && sed -i.bak '/sourceMappingURL=purify.min.js.map/d' static/vendor/purify.min.js && rm static/vendor/purify.min.js.bak
